announcements.text: New AI Tools Guide Available - Check out our latest comprehensive guide!

products.title: ChatGPT Plus Subscription
products.description: Unlock the full potential of AI with ChatGPT Plus. Get faster responses, priority access to new features, and GPT-4 capabilities for enhanced productivity.

products.title: Midjourney AI Art Generator
products.description: Create stunning AI-generated artwork with Midjourney. Perfect for designers, content creators, and artists looking to explore AI creativity.

products.title: Surfer SEO AI Tool
products.description: Optimize your content with AI-powered SEO analysis. Get data-driven recommendations to rank higher in search results.

products.title: Jasper AI Writing Assistant
products.description: Generate high-quality content in seconds with Jasper AI. Perfect for blog posts, marketing copy, and social media content.

products.title: Notion AI Workspace
products.description: Supercharge your productivity with Notion AI. Write, summarize, and brainstorm with integrated AI assistance.

products.title: Grammarly Premium AI
products.description: Enhance your writing with AI-powered grammar checking, clarity suggestions, and tone detection. Perfect for professionals.

products.title: Canva Pro Design Suite
products.description: Create professional designs with AI-powered features. Magic design, background removal, and brand kit included.

products.title: Descript AI Video Editor
products.description: Edit videos by editing text with AI-powered transcription. Perfect for podcasters and content creators.

links.description: Learn about the latest AI models and APIs from OpenAI's official documentation.

links.description: Explore thousands of pre-trained AI models and datasets for your projects.

links.title: Google Analytics Academy
links.description: Free courses on digital marketing and analytics from Google.

links.title: GitHub Copilot
links.description: AI-powered code completion and suggestions for developers.
